# The Focus Vault

> Kiosk-grade digital detox & extreme accountability app for founders. 9–5 hard lockdown. $20 fine + 10 vouchers to break glass.

The Focus Vault hard-locks a user's phone Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Exit requires both a $20 override fine and approval from 10 designated human Vouchers. Three Gemini agents handle pre-lock contracting, voucher pre-screening, and anti-churn analysis.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview, rules, and pricing.
- [Pre-Lock Huddle](/huddle): 2-minute conversational focus-contracting with the AI agent.
- [Lock Screen Demo](/lock): Live preview of the kiosk-mode lock screen with countdown.
- [Break-Glass Override](/break-glass): Walk-through of the $20 fine + voucher dispatch flow.

## Optional
- [Voucher Portal (sample)](/vouch/demo-vote-001): The single-purpose page accountability partners receive.
